'''Uopled''' was a male [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] black marketeer.

Having initially attempted a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunting]] career, Uopled began working for a [[Invisible Market|black marketeer]]. He discovered he was naturally talented at this line of work, excelling in negotiations, and soon made a fortune dealing in stolen goods. He then bought [[Petabys Station]] very cheaply and transformed it into one of the most successful [[Invisible Market]]s during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
